_meta.description: Material survival matrix for environment and exposure checks. Ratings are qualitative and intended for fast agent triage before geometry generation.

uv_resistance.notes: Direct sun causes embrittlement and color fade quickly; not suitable for long outdoor service.

temperature_range.notes: Above 50-55C, creep and deformation accelerate rapidly.

moisture.notes: Short wet exposure is usually fine, but long immersion and heat can hydrolyze PLA over time.

chemicals.notes: PLA is broadly vulnerable to solvents and fuel exposure.

vibration_fatigue.cycle_life_estimate: ~10k low-amplitude cycles before crack risk rises
vibration_fatigue.notes: Brittle failure mode limits repeated cyclic duty.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Surface wears quickly under sliding contact.

uv_resistance.notes: Can survive periodic outdoor use, but long direct UV exposure eventually embrittles the surface.

temperature_range.notes: A common upper bound for functional parts; avoid prolonged loads above this range.

moisture.notes: Low absorption makes PETG a practical choice for wet functional parts.

chemicals.notes: Resists many household chemicals; avoid aggressive solvent soak.

vibration_fatigue.notes: Reasonable resilience, but lower fatigue life than nylon.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Adequate for intermittent sliding; not ideal for bearing surfaces.

uv_resistance.notes: UV exposure causes chalking and brittleness; use ASA for long-term sun.

temperature_range.notes: Suitable for warmer environments than PETG/PLA when printed well.

moisture.notes: Handles occasional water contact; not ideal for long immersion precision parts.

chemicals.notes: Avoid ketones/aromatic solvents; stress cracking can occur.

vibration_fatigue.notes: Tough matrix provides useful fatigue performance in impact-prone parts.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Better wear behavior than PLA/PETG in many dry sliding applications.

uv_resistance.notes: Flexible parts tolerate outdoor use better than PLA, but prolonged UV still hardens material.

temperature_range.notes: Flexibility remains usable over wide temperatures, though stiffness changes with temperature.

moisture.notes: Can be used in wet service, but dimensions can drift in long immersion.

chemicals.notes: Many TPU blends are solvent-sensitive; verify for specific filament chemistry.

vibration_fatigue.notes: Excellent for damping and repeated deformation components.

abrasion_resistance.notes: High wear resilience makes TPU suitable for bumpers and friction interfaces.

uv_resistance.notes: Designed for outdoor exposure; maintains color and toughness significantly longer than ABS.

temperature_range.notes: Good weathering plus temperature stability for exterior fixtures.

moisture.notes: Low moisture uptake supports stable dimensions in humid outdoor conditions.

chemicals.notes: Performs well in general outdoor/garage chemical contact, but avoid strong solvents.

vibration_fatigue.notes: Reliable for outdoor mounts and enclosures with moderate vibration.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Stable surface wear for utility hardware and external housings.

uv_resistance.notes: Unfilled nylon outdoors benefits from UV-stable pigments or coatings for long life.

temperature_range.notes: Maintains toughness across broad temperatures; moisture state affects stiffness.

moisture.notes: High absorption can cause dimensional growth and property drift in humid or wet service.

chemicals.notes: Excellent for lubricated/mechanical environments, but strong acids can attack polyamide.

vibration_fatigue.notes: One of the best FDM materials for repeated cyclic loading.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Low-friction and high wear resistance make nylon strong for gears and bushings.

uv_resistance.notes: UV exposure causes yellowing and some property loss; UV-stabilized PC performs better.

temperature_range.notes: Highest practical service temperature among common desktop FDM materials.

moisture.notes: Moderate uptake; dry-state assumptions are needed for precision and long-term stiffness.

chemicals.notes: Susceptible to environmental stress cracking with solvents and some cleaners.

vibration_fatigue.notes: Combines high toughness with good fatigue behavior in structural duty.

abrasion_resistance.notes: Robust wear resistance when printed with high interlayer fusion quality.
